name: localized_color_focus
description: Creates a concrete artifact image under artifacts/ showing a region-proposal overlay plus a candidate zoom strip for localized inspection of colorful or high-detail regions. Useful for direct visible-color questions about clothing, accessories, or other salient local objects without assuming a fixed class or fixed position.
applicability_conditions: Creates a concrete artifact image under artifacts/ showing a region-proposal overlay plus a candidate zoom strip for localized inspection of colorful or high-detail regions.
